channel.title: Cloud Security on The Hidden Port
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud Security on The Hidden Port

item.title: 5 Critical AWS Security Misconfigurations (2026 Edition) – How to Find & Fix Them
item.description: A practical guide to the five most common AWS security misconfigurations in 2026 and how to fix them using the AWS Console and Terraform.

item.title: AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore: Full Policy Breakdown
item.description: What AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore actually permits, when to use it for Session Manager, and how to build a scoped-down custom policy for production.

item.title: AWS Security Checklist 2026: 30+ Controls for IAM, EC2 & S3
item.description: Free 2026 AWS security checklist with 30+ actionable controls. Covers IAM hardening, S3 lockdown, CloudTrail logging, encryption, and compliance basics.

item.title: IAM Users Are Dead: Modern AWS Access Control for 2026
item.description: Why AWS IAM users are obsolete in 2026 - and how to implement secure, scalable alternatives with Identity Center, OIDC, and temporary credentials.

item.title: Meeting CIS Benchmarks for EC2: A Practical Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guidance on meeting CIS Benchmarks for EC2 in AWS. Learn how to map controls, audit compliance, and automate remediation using AWS services and open-source tools.

item.title: EKS Security: Monitoring, Audit Logs & Runtime Detection
item.description: Secure Amazon EKS clusters with CloudWatch, GuardDuty, audit logs, and Falco runtime detection. Includes architecture examples and common pitfalls.

item.title: EC2 Hardening Guide: Secure AWS Instances Step by Step
item.description: Harden EC2 instances with IAM least privilege, OS lockdown, encryption, logging, and CIS benchmark checks. Practical guide with console and Terraform examples.

item.title: AWS Incident Response Guide for Small Security Teams
item.description: Build an AWS incident response process using CloudTrail, GuardDuty, and automation. Includes free playbook template, forensic steps, and Terraform code.

item.title: Building Least-Privilege IAM Roles with IAM Access Analyzer
item.description: Learn how to use IAM Access Analyzer to identify risky permissions, generate fine-tuned IAM policies, and integrate the tool into your AWS development workflow.

item.title: How to Detect AWS Root Account Usage (And Respond to It)
item.description: This guide walks you through detecting and responding to AWS root account usage using CloudTrail, EventBridge, SNS, and optionally Lambda or Slack. Includes Terraform examples and AWS Console workflows.
